name: e2e-chain-context
description: A real chain flow passes previous-step output context to the next Pi child agent.

steps.task: Reply exactly CHAIN_CONTEXT_TOKEN_7381 and do not inspect or modify files.
If the previous chain step context contains CHAIN_CONTEXT_TOKEN_7381, reply exactly E2E_CHAIN_CONTEXT_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_CHAIN_CONTEXT_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
